meta.title: {businessName} — Professional barbershop & grooming | Book online
meta.description: {businessName} is a professional barbershop offering precision cuts, beard work, and men’s grooming with online booking and clear pricing.{suffix}

pageMeta.stylesDescription: Browse the full service menu at {businessName} — styles, filters, and pricing so you know what to book.
pageMeta.bookingsDescription: Pick services and a time at {businessName}. Manage upcoming visits and cancellations in one place.
pageMeta.accountDescription: Shortcuts to styles, bookings, and orders for {businessName} clients.
pageMeta.ordersDescription: Create and review order snapshots linked to your {businessName} account.

footer.tagline: Precision cuts, relaxed atmosphere, and service that respects your time — your go-to barber in your neighborhood.
footer.platformRights: Platform software and related intellectual property are built and owned by

hero.body: Searching for a barber near me? Book online at {businessName}, arrive on time, and leave with a cut shaped for your texture, lifestyle, and calendar.
hero.sameDayBody: Tell us your ideal time — we will confirm fast and keep you updated.

services.heading: Services built for real life
services.subheading: Transparent pricing, thoughtful timing, and finishes that hold up through work weeks and weekends.

classicCut.name: Classic cut & finish
classicCut.description: Consultation, precision cut, and finish — tailored to your hair texture and parting. Includes a quick style check before you head out.

skinFade.name: Skin fade
skinFade.description: Clean taper with a sharp fade and detailed lineup. Ideal when you want definition that stays crisp for weeks.

beardSculpt.name: Beard sculpt
beardSculpt.description: Shape, trim, and balance — hot towel optional. We map the beard to your jawline and maintenance routine.

hotTowel.name: Hot towel add-on
hotTowel.description: Relaxing prep before a trim or finish. Great if you want extra comfort or have sensitive skin.

gallery.label: Gallery
gallery.heading: Texture & tone
gallery.body: A snapshot of recent work — crisp edges, soft blends, and finishes tailored to each client.
gallery.empty: No gallery images are listed yet.

testimonial.label: Testimonial
testimonial.quote: “Fast, precise, and the vibe is right. I book on my phone and walk out looking camera-ready.”

team.label: Team
team.heading: People behind the chair
team.body: Experienced stylists who listen first — then shape a cut that fits your routine.
team.loadError: We couldn't load the team list.
team.empty: No team members are listed yet.

contact.label: Visit
contact.heading: Ready when you are
contact.body: Pick a style from our menu, then choose a time — sign in when you are ready to confirm. Browse the catalog anytime after you create an account.

stylesPage.title: Styles menu
stylesPage.description: Browse our full menu of cuts and styles—filter by who it's for, see pricing at a glance, and walk in knowing exactly what to ask for.

stylesCatalog.emptySeed: No styles yet. Seed the catalog in Postgres or run the server migration SQL.

bookingsPage.reminderNote: We can send SMS and email reminders before your visit and a thank-you with receipt details afterward, using the phone and email on your account.

adminSettings.title: Site settings
adminSettings.subtitle: Theme, notification toggles, and locale (Twilio and SendGrid keys stay in server env).
adminSettings.emailThankYou: Email thank-you / receipt after completed visit
